termsDialog.title: Terms and Conditions
termsDialog.content:
Welcome to Open ERP. By using this service, you agree to the following terms:

1. Account Usage: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account.

2. Data Privacy: We respect your privacy and protect your personal information according to applicable laws.

3. Service Usage: You agree to use this service in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations.

4. Intellectual Property: All content and materials available on this service are protected by intellectual property rights.

5. Limitation of Liability: The service is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind.

6. Changes to Terms: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time.

For full terms and conditions, please visit our website.
